reference: Ma et al., Nature Machine Intelligence 2025 — https://github.com/bowang-lab/IntegrAO

fixed_hps.note: hidden_channels is hardcoded in IntegrAO's training loop; the rest follow paper defaults

searched_hps.search_strategy: external SLURM sweep — one job per HP combo; best HP selected post-hoc from results; no inner CV (GNN training too expensive)

nomics.values: all subsets of size 2..5 from [mrna, dnam, rppa, mirna, cnv]

modes.supervised: End-to-end GNN classification fine-tuning on train patients; inductive inference on test patients via integrao_predictor
modes.unsupervised: Unsupervised GNN embedding on train patients; logistic regression on top; inductive embedding inference for test patients

cv.note: inner_splits declared for API compatibility but inner CV is NOT run for IntegrAO — HPs are swept externally

slurm.gpu: optional — add --gres=gpu:1 to sbatch for faster GNN training

quickstart: # 1. Generate smoke-test jobs (1 HP combo, 1 frac, supervised only)
bash make_hp_missing.sh  # edit to reduce grid first for smoke test
